resources.string: Please confirm your country code and enter your phone number.
Please enter your phone number\nor **log in using passkey >**
This account is already logged in from this app.
Contacts from this device will be added to this account.
Contacts from this device will not be added to this account.
Contacts from this device will be added to your account.
Turn on to continuously sync contacts from this device with your account.
Contacts from this device were added to your account.

The number you provided is too short for **%1$s**:

**%2$s**

Please enter the correct number including your country code.

If you didn't get the code by SMS or call, please check your **cellular data settings** and phone number:

**%1$s**

Your remaining options are to try another number or to contact Telegram Support. Tap **Help** to send us the technical details so that we can identify the problem.
We’ve sent an SMS with an activation code to your phone **%1$s**.
We\'ve sent the code to the **Telegram** app on your other device.
We\'ve sent the code to the **Telegram** app for %1$s on your other device.
Get the code for %1$s in the Anonymous Numbers section on Fragment.
We\'re calling your phone **%1$s**.\n\nDon\'t accept the call, Telegram will process everything automatically.
Calling your phone **%1$s** to dictate the code.
You entered the wrong code. Please try again.
Send the code as an SMS

Somebody with access to **%1$s** has requested to delete your Telegram account and reset your 2-Step Verification password.\n\nIf this wasn\'t you, please enter the code we\'ve just sent you via SMS. You can also cancel this by *changing your phone number*.
Since the account **%1$s** is active and protected by a password, we will delete it in 1 week for security purposes.\n\nYou can cancel this process at any time.
You\'ll be able to reset your account in:
Your recent attempts to reset this account have been cancelled by its active user. Please try again in 7 days.
The deletion process was cancelled for your account %1$s. You may close this window now.
Your login code is **%1$s**. Enter it in the Telegram app where you are trying to log in.\n\nDo not give this code to anyone.
You can request an SMS in %1$d:%2$02d
You can request a new SMS in %1$d:%2$02d
You can request a voice call in %1$d:%2$02d
Call me to dictate the code
Get the code via phone call
Enter your name and add a profile picture.
You have just successfully transferred %1$s to %2$s for %3$s
You have just successfully transferred %1$s to %2$s for %3$s until %4$s
You have just successfully transferred %1$s to %2$s
You have just successfully transferred %1$s to %2$s until %3$s
You successfully transferred %1$s to %2$s for %3$s and allowed future recurrent payments
You successfully transferred %1$s to %2$s and allowed future recurrent payments
Sorry, it is not possible to deliver to your address.
You can save your shipping info for future use.
You can save your payment info for future use.
Please *turn on Two-Step Verification* to enable this.
Your card %1$s is on file. To pay with this card, please enter your 2-Step-Verification password.
Sorry, the payment was cancelled by the bot.
Unable to reach payment server. Please check your internet connection and try again.
There was an error during payment confirmation.

Neither Telegram, nor %1$s will have access to your credit card information. Credit card details will be handled only by the payment system, %2$s.\n\nPayments will go directly to the developer of %1$s. Telegram cannot provide any guarantees, so proceed at your own risk. In case of problems, please contact the developer of %1$s or your bank.
Please create a password to protect your payment info. You\'ll be asked to enter it when you log in.
Please enter a valid email address. It is the only way to recover a forgotten password.
Phone will be passed to %1$s as billing info.
Email address will be passed to %1$s as billing info.
Phone and email address will be passed to %1$s as billing info.
No app found to handle this deep link.
There were no results for \"%s\".\nTry a new search.
Start messaging by tapping the pencil button in the bottom right corner.
Start messaging by tapping the pencil button in the bottom right corner.
Automatically delete new messages after a certain period of time for you and %1$s.
Automatically delete new messages after a certain period of time for members of this group.
Automatically delete new messages after a certain period of time for subscribers of this channel.
Automatically delete new messages sent in this chat after a certain period of time.
Messages in this chat are automatically\ndeleted %1$s after they are sent.
New messages in this chat will be automatically deleted in %1$s.
Are you sure you want to delete this contact?
Are you sure you want to delete these contacts?
Swipe left on the archive to hide it.
Swipe down to see the archive.
Hide the archive by swiping left on it.

Archive
... [OUTPUT TRUNCATED - 832390 chars omitted out of 882390 total] ...
ficient
Cocoon has allowed Telegram to reduce translation cost by 6x.
Any developer can use Cocoon for AI features. Learn more at **cocoon.org**
Want to integrate Cocoon into your projects?\nReach out at **t.me/cocoon?direct**
Summarize large messages with AI — unlimited in Telegram Premium.
A limited play-test of the upcoming emoji mini-game platform for a small group of users.
A streak resets after 3 🎲 or a stake change.
This site will receive your **name**,\n**username** and **profile photo**.
This bot will receive your **name**,\n**username** and **profile photo**.
This app will receive your **name**,\n**username** and **profile photo**.
This login attempt came from the device above.
This will allow %s to message you.
**%1$s** wants to access your phone number **%2$s**.\n\nAllow access?
You\'re now logged in to **%s**, but you didn\'t grant access to your phone number.
Tap the emoji shown\non your login screen
Tap the code shown\non your login screen
Please try logging in to **%s** again.
Share an unlimited number of photos\nand videos of up to 2 GB each.
Share an unlimited number of photos\nand videos of up to 4 GB each.
Tap + to add your first gift
If crafting fails, all selected gifts\nwill be consumed.
The crafting attempt was unsuccessful.\n**%d** gift was lost.
The crafting attempt was unsuccessful.\n**%d** gifts were lost.
Add up to **4** gifts to craft new

**%s** gift.

If crafting fails, all selected gifts
will be **lost**.
Add up to **4** gifts to craft new

**%1$s #%2$s**.

If crafting fails, all selected gifts
will be **lost**.
You don\'t have other gifts\nfrom this collection.
You need to add up to **%d gift** from\nthe same collection for crafting.
You need to add up to **%d gifts** from\nthe same collection for crafting.
Turn your gifts into rare, epic\nand legendary versions.
Select up to 4 gifts to craft a new exclusive model.
Combine more gifts to increase your odds of success.
Use gifts with the same attribute to boost its chance.
You will be able to craft this gift %s.
These gifts currently can\'t be crafted.
This gift will become available for crafting on **%s**.
**%1$d%%** chance the crafted gift will have **%2$s** symbol.
**%1$d%%** chance the crafted gift will have **%2$s** symbol.
**%1$d%%** chance the crafted gift will have **%2$s** background.
**%1$d%%** chance the crafted gift will have **%2$s** background.
This gift can’t be used as the first one in crafting, because it has been recorded on the blockchain.
If you leave, **%1$s** will become the new owner of **%2$s** in **1 week**.
If you leave, **%1$s** will become the new owner of **%2$s** in **1 week**.
Share your role, title or how you’re known in this group. Your tag is visible to all members.
Add a short tag next to %s’s name.
This grey tag un1 is **%1$s’s** member tag.\n**%1$s** is a member of **%2$s**.
This green tag un1 is **%1$s’s** admin tag.\n**%1$s** is an administrator of **%2$s**.
This purple tag un1 is **%1$s’s** owner tag.\n**%1$s** is the owner of **%2$s**.
Only admins can set member tags in this group.
Disable screenshots and screen\nrecordings in this chat.
Disable copying texts and saving photos\nand videos to gallery.
Sharing will disabled if **%s** approves it
Sharing will enabled if **%s** approves it
You disabled sharing in this chat
You enabled sharing in this chat
Sharing in this chat is still disabled
Sharing in this chat is still enabled
**%s** would like to enable sharing in this chat, which includes:
You suggest to enable sharing in this chat, which includes:
**%s** would like to disable sharing in this chat
You suggest to disable sharing in this chat
**%s** would like to enable sharing in this chat
You suggest to enable sharing in this chat
**%s** would like to disable sharing in this chat, which includes:
You suggest to disable sharing in this chat, which includes:
Are you sure you want to keep sharing disabled?
Are you sure you want to disable sharing?
Are you sure you want to keep sharing enabled?
Are you sure you want to enable sharing?
Display voter name on each option
Voters can select more than one option
Answers appear in random order for each voter
Mark one option as the right answer
Automatically close the poll at a set time
Only subscribers who joined\n24+ hours ago can vote
Only users from selected\ncountries can vote
Attach a link to this option.
If you switch this on, results will appear only after the poll closes.
This poll option has a media attachment. Do you want to delete it?
This quiz answer has a media attachment. Do you want to delete it?
Add text or remove media first
Only subscribers who joined more than **24 hours** ago can vote.
Only subscribers from **%1$s** and **%2$s** can vote.
Only users from **%1$s** and **%2$s** can vote.
You created un1 bot for un2 to manage
**%s** would like you to create\nand manage a chatbot on your behalf.
**%s** will manage this bot for you.
**%1$s** is ready!\n\nTap **Start** below to test your new chatbot. Its behavior is defined by **%2$s**.
You can create another bot in %s.
Subscribe to **Premium** to create up to %1$d bots, or delete one of your %2$d bots via @BotFather
You can create up to %d bots, or delete your current ones via @BotFather
Rewrite, translate, or correct your text using AI.
Get **Telegram Premium** for **50x** more AI text transformation per day.
Press and hold the style to edit or share the link.
Tap \'AI\' > \'%s\' when typing your next long message.
Are you sure you want to delete this style? It will be removed for everyone who installed it.
Add this style to instantly\nrewrite your messages.
Instructions (for example "write in bold, nautical tone, light slang (aye, matey), vivid sea imagery, playful swagger, rhythmic phrasing, adventurous mood")
Add a link to my account
You can save up to %1$d styles, or subscribe to **Telegram Premium** for %2$d styles.
You can save up to %1$d styles.
Sent AI Style link to **Saved Messages**
Sent AI Style link to **a chat**.
Sent AI Style link to **%1$d chats**.
You have reached the maximum number of website exceptions. Please remove some existing ones to add new ones.
New subscribers will now need approval from **%1$s** before they can join this channel.
New members will now need approval from **%1$s** before they can send messages in this group.
New members will no longer need approval from **%1$s** before they can send messages in this group.
New subscribers will no longer need approval from **%1$s** before they can join this channel.
Also enable **Approve New Members** for **%1$d existing invite link** in this group?
Also enable **Approve New Members** for **%1$d existing invite links** in this group?
Also disable **Approve New Members** for **%1$d existing invite link** in this group?
Also disable **Approve New Members** for **%1$d existing invite links** in this group?
Also enable **Approve New Members** for **%1$d existing invite link** in this channel?
Also enable **Approve New Members** for **%1$d existing invite links** in this channel?
Also disable **Approve New Members** for **%1$d existing invite link** in this channel?
Also disable **Approve New Members** for **%1$d existing invite links** in this channel?
**%1$s** is currently processing join requests. Switch to **%2$s** instead?
Your request to join **%1$s** has been approved
Your request to join **%1$s** has been declined
Your request to join **%1$s** has been sent to the admins
This bot can\'t read the chat — only the message where it was mentioned.
Connect your account to WatchOS device\nto use it separately from your watch.
